description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe featuring a vibrant, psychedelic pattern in shades of purple, pink, and black, with white accents. The upper is adorned with swirling floral and paisley motifs, giving it a bold and eye-catching appearance. The shoe has a robust white lacing system with multiple eyelets and overlays, providing both support and a striking visual contrast. The midsole is white, while the outsole is black with a rugged tread, suggesting good traction for urban environments. The heel and toe areas are reinforced, and the collar is padded for comfort. The overall design is modern and expressive, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A high-top athletic shoe with a vivid purple and pink paisley pattern, white laces, and a black sole, designed for urban style and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the intricate paisley pattern, white overlays, and the full lacing system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical lacing, rounded toe, and the bold pattern extending across the toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same vibrant pattern and structural overlays as the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the padded heel, white heel counter, and the continuation of the patterned upper.
